  "findings": [
    "Missing box extension on deep finish"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved box extension to bring the box edge flush with or within 1/4 inch of the finished wall surface"
  ],
  "rationale": "The box is set too far back from the finished surface due to a deep finish. Per NEC 314.20, in walls or ceilings of noncombustible material, boxes shall not be set back more than 1/4 inch, and in combustible materials, they must be flush with or project from the finished surface. A box extension is required to correct this gap.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 314.20",
    "NEC 314.16"
  ]
}
